meta.title: KiX — The Gamification Marketing Platform
meta.description: Win customers through play. Free gamification SaaS — pay only when we deliver a new customer.
meta.og_description: All gamification features are free. You only pay when a new customer arrives.
hero.title: Win customers through play
hero.sub: All gamification features are free. You only pay when we deliver a new customer.
problem.title: Customer acquisition is broken
problem.sub: Three forces are pushing CAC up and retention down.
problem.card1.title: Acquisition costs up 50% YoY
problem.card1.body: Auction-based ad markets keep raising the price of every new customer.
problem.card2.title: Audiences are ad-blind
problem.card2.body: Most users now skip past ads in a glance — banner blindness is the default.
problem.card3.title: Loyalty retention under 25%
problem.card3.body: Traditional points cards rarely earn a second visit.
solution.title: Four pillars, one growth engine
solution.sub: Gamification turns attention into acquisition — measurably.
solution.card1.title: Gamification
solution.card1.body: AI-generated mini-games, free to deploy. Zero engineering lift.
solution.card2.title: Smart acquisition
solution.card2.body: Pay only for the new customers we deliver. Wasted impressions cost nothing.
solution.card3.title: Cross-brand network
solution.card3.body: Our matching engine routes the right user to the right brand across the network.
solution.card4.title: Real-time analytics
solution.card4.body: Track CAC, ROAS and cohort retention live — every cent is attributable.
how.title: Three steps to your first delivered customer
how.sub: From registration to ROI in days, not quarters.
how.step1.title: Register your brand
how.step1.body: Create an account and get the full SaaS workspace — games, SDK and analytics — instantly and free.
how.step2.title: Activate the auction
how.step2.body: Set a bid per new customer and let the KiX algorithm match qualified users to your brand.
how.step3.title: Pay per delivered customer
how.step3.body: Only verified new customers are billable. No minimums, no long-term contracts.
industries.title: 34 verticals supported
industries.sub: From F&B to real estate — purpose-built playbooks per category.
pricing.title: Transparent pricing. No subscription, no setup fee.
pricing.sub: Free SaaS. Pay only for results.
pricing.free.label: Free forever
pricing.free.desc: All gamification capabilities, at no cost.
pricing.free.item3: SDKs for Web, iOS and Android
pricing.free.item4: No brand limits, no user caps
pricing.paid.label: Pay for acquisition
pricing.paid.cpa.name: CPA
pricing.paid.cpa.label: per new customer
pricing.paid.cps.name: CPS
pricing.paid.cps.label: share of new-customer revenue
pricing.paid.cpm.name: CPM
pricing.paid.cpm.label: per thousand impressions
pricing.paid.cpv.name: CPV
pricing.paid.cpv.label: per store visit
pricing.paid.cpe.name: CPE
pricing.paid.cpe.label: per engagement
proof.title: Early customers are growing with KiX
proof.q1.text: Across ten stores, our KiX bids won 91% of auctions and delivered 41 new customers in the first sprint.
proof.q1.author: Nanyang Tea
proof.q2.text: KiX reminders lifted our treatment repeat rate to 36% — about 2.4x our previous SMS programme.
proof.q2.author: Bare Beauty
proof.q3.text: A 7-month attribution window surfaced honeymoon bookings that standard ad platforms never see.
proof.q3.author: Worldwide Travel
users.title: Download the KiX app — play games, earn rewards
users.sub: Play at any KiX partner merchant, earn rewards and discover new brands.
users.card.title: Play to earn
users.card.body: Scan a QR code at a participating merchant. Win real rewards — discounts, free items and exclusive experiences.

footer.about: The gamification marketing platform. Every merchant gets a free customer-acquisition engine — and only pays for results.

footer.built: Built with Trinity Protocol · 525 routes · 5 iteration rounds
compliance.title: Built for regulated markets
compliance.sub: Data residency, privacy and cultural sensitivity are not afterthoughts — they're shipped from day one across every country we operate in.
compliance.halal_sub: No gambling mechanics or pig imagery
compliance.note: No spin-to-win lottery mechanics. All games are skill or chance-as-reward, not chance-for-money. Game library reviewed for cultural sensitivity per market.
footer.compliance_inline: PDPA-SG · PDPA-MY · GDPR-aligned · Halal-aware library · No gambling mechanics
